goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and excited about seeing local tourist attractions. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the centre. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 12:30 on thursday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the same area as the restaurant. Make sure you get attraction type and entrance fee. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Hi there. Real quick. Having a blast. I want a REALLY good restaurant not too far from my hotel. What do you have?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I'll be happy to help- but I need to know what region your hotel is in first.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I'm in the centre of town.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: We have a lot of restaurants available in the city centre.  Do you prefer a certain type of food?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I have no food preference, but I would prefer an expensive restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The Bedouin is an African restaurant that offers a high quality experience. Would you be interested?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes. Please book for 7 people on Thursday at 12:30.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have made that reservation for you. Your reference number is K7HFUCR6. Is there anything else I can help you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am also looking for an attraction in the same area I will eat.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have about 44 different attractions in the centre of town. Lots of architecture, colleges, boating, cinemas, concerthalls, museums, nightclubs, swimming pools, and theatres. What interests you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you recommend a place?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I like great saint mary's church.  Need some info on it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, how much is the entrance fee for st. mary's church?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Great Saint Mary's Church is located in Market Square, cb23pq and the entrance fee is 2 pounds. Would you like a booking?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No thank you that will be all

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It was my pleasure. Have a good evening.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of college and should be in the west. Make sure you get address. You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called carolina bed and breakfast. Make sure you get hotel type, phone number, and postcode. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 09:45. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Are there any colleges in the west of town that I could go to? Thanks.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 5 colleges on the west side of town. I recommend checking out Churchill College. It's beautiful and free to get in!

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is the address to Churchhill College?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Churchill college is on storey's way.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: thank you! I also am looking for carolina bed and breakfast

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Carolina bed and breakfast is in the east area, can I book that for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No thanks, just gathering information.  Can I get the hotel type, phone number and postal code please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You sure may.  It is a beautiful guesthouse located in postal code cb13nx.  Their phone number is 01223247015.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you for the info.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You are welcome.  Can I help you with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No that will be all thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Glad I could help you. Thanks for using our service have a nice day.

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the expensive price range. The restaurant should serve thai food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 5 people at 15:00 on thursday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called ballare. Make sure you get attraction type. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Please find me a place to dine that's expensive and in the centre.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Fitzbillies restaurant is expensive in the centre of town. Would you like to try that?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am looking for Thai food.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: we have bankok city. it is located in 24 green street centre. can i give you the phone number?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Ok great. Can you reserve a table there for Thursday for 5 people at 15:00 please?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: it was successful. Reference number is : AKNPF1IH.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you for your help.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your very welcome. Can I help you with anything else today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes a hotel please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Okay.  I can help you with that.  Can you help me narrow the options down by providing preferences such as area, price range, and type?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: You know what? I don't need a hotel after all. I heard something about an attraction called ballare, could you give me some information about it?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Ballare is a nightclub located in the centre area. the phone is 01223364222 and the entrance fee is 5 pounds. Can I help you with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That is everything. Thank you so much for your help.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today - transportation perhaps, or other attractions?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That is all I need.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thanks for using the Cambridge booking service and have a great day.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of museum. Make sure you get area and address. You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve chinese food. The restaurant should be in the cheap price range. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 19:30 on monday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Find me a museum, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are 23 museums. Do you have an area as a preference?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I just need the area and address for one of them.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have the broughton house gallery in the centre at 98 king street

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Thank you so much. I also need a place to dine in the centre that serves Chinese food.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have 10 place in the centre. Did you have a price range you were looking at?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like the cheap price range.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I recommend the rice house. Would you like me to reserve a table?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, please book me a table for 8 on Monday at 19:30.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Unfortunately, I could not book the rice house for that day and time. Is there another day or time that would work for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you try a half hour earlier or later and see if they have anything available?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: No luck, would you like me to try something else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, please find another cheap restaurant for that amount of people at that time.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I was unable to book any cheap chinese restaurants, do you have another preference for time?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am really needing to find a cheap restaurant that serves chinese food that is located in the centre. Would you mind double checking?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have the charlie chan. It is a chinese restaurant in the centre that is cheap. Would you like me to make you a booking?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Sure for 8 people at 19:30 on Monday please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: My apologies, I am still not finding availability.  Perhaps another day or a different time slot?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: We're on a tight schedule and 19:30 is the only time we can all meet. Can we try one more restaurant? Not Rice House or Charlie Chan.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have successfully booked your reservation at Golden House, your reference number is 0D4NXZFQ.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I also need a taxi to commute between the hotel and the museum.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Sure, I can help you with that. What time would you like to depart or arrive by?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I just want to make sure we arrive by the reservation time to the restaurant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance:
Booking completed!
Booked car type	:	yellow ford
Contact number	:	07311583269

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That is all. Thank you for your help.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thank you for using Cambridge TownInfo centre! Have a good day!
